PERCYJACKSON-DISARM.title: Disarm
PERCYJACKSON-ONE_TWO_STAB.title: One-Two Stab
PERCYJACKSON-NOBODY_TOUCH_HER.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Combo[/gold] {ComboX:diff()}: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies again.
PERCYJACKSON-NOBODY_TOUCH_HER.title: Nobody Touch Her!
PERCYJACKSON-QUICK_PARRY.title: Quick Parry
PERCYJACKSON-UNEXPECTED_STRATEGY.descrip: Add a random [gold]Combo[/gold] card to your hand. It is free to play this turn.
PERCYJACKSON-UNEXPECTED_STRATEGY.title: Unexpected Strategy
PERCYJACKSON-PEN_CAP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card ALWAYS returns to your hand at the start of your turn, no matter where it is.
PERCYJACKSON-PEN_CAP.title: Pen Cap
PERCYJACKSON-SEAS_EMBRACE.title: Embrace of the Sea
PERCYJACKSON-NO_SWEAT.title: No Sweat
PERCYJACKSON-INCOMING_WAVE.title: Incoming Wave
PERCYJACKSON-RIDE_THE_WAVE.title: Ride The Wave
PERCYJACKSON-ST_LOUIS_ARCH.title: St Louis' Arch
PERCYJACKSON-SURFACE_TENSION.description: Raise the maximum [gold]Tide[/gold] by {Tide:diff()} this turn.
PERCYJACKSON-SURFACE_TENSION.title: Surface Tension
PERCYJACKSON-RAISING_THE_TIBER.descripti: At the start of your turn, raise the maximum [gold]Tide[/gold] by {Tide:diff()}.
PERCYJACKSON-RAISING_THE_TIBER.title: Raising The Tiber
PERCYJACKSON-HIGH_TIDE.description:
Deal damage equal to twice the maximum [gold]Tide[/gold]{ExtraDamage:cond:>0?+{ExtraDamage:diff()}|}.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)}
PERCYJACKSON-HIGH_TIDE.title: High Tide
PERCYJACKSON-SURFING_LESSONS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] by the unblocked damage dealt.
PERCYJACKSON-SURFING_LESSONS.title: Surfing Lessons
PERCYJACKSON-HYDROGENESIS.description:
Exhaust {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}{IfUpgraded:.| at random.}
Gain [gold]Tide[/gold] equal to the exhausted {Cards:plural:card's|cards'} cost.
PERCYJACKSON-HYDROGENESIS.title: Hydrogenesis
PERCYJACKSON-CAPTURE_THE_FLAG.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {HitCount:diff()} {HitCount:plural:time|times}.
Raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] by {Tide:diff()} for each hit.
Increase the number of hits by {HitIncrease:diff()} this combat.
PERCYJACKSON-CAPTURE_THE_FLAG.title: Capture The Flag
PERCYJACKSON-STORMBRINGER.title: Stormbringer
PERCYJACKSON-EYE_OF_THE_STORM.descriptio:
Gain {BlockAmt:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for every level of [gold]Tide[/gold].
Next turn, gain the same amount of [gold]Block[/gold].
You cannot raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] next turn.
PERCYJACKSON-EYE_OF_THE_STORM.title: Eye Of The Storm
PERCYJACKSON-GETTING_SERIOUS.title: Getting Serious
PERCYJACKSON-LOOK_OVER_THERE.title: Look Over There
PERCYJACKSON-FREE_THE_AQUARIUM.descripti:
Lower the [gold]Tide[/gold] by {Tide:diff()}.
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your hand that you can't play.
Shuffle {Copies:diff()} {Copies:plural:copy|copies} into your draw pile that cost 0 [gold]Energy[/gold] until played.
PERCYJACKSON-FREE_THE_AQUARIUM.title: Free The Aquarium
PERCYJACKSON-SON_OF_NEPTUNE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {TideMult:diff()} additional damage for all [gold]Tide[/gold] gained this combat.
PERCYJACKSON-SON_OF_NEPTUNE.title: Son Of Neptune
PERCYJACKSON-WAVE_CRASH.description:
Lower the [gold]Tide[/gold] by {Tide:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} to ALL enemies.
PERCYJACKSON-WAVE_CRASH.title: Wave Crash
PERCYJACKSON-WHIRLPOOL.description:
Lower the [gold]Tide[/gold] to 0.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies a number of times equal to the [gold]Tide[/gold] lost.
PERCYJACKSON-WHIRLPOOL.title: Whirlpool
PERCYJACKSON-WATER_WALKING.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain {Tide:diff()} [gold]Tide[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-WATER_WALKING.title: Walking on Water
PERCYJACKSON-BUBBLE.description: Whenever you overflow the [gold]Tide[/gold], gain {Block} extra [gold]Block[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-BUBBLE.title: Bubble
PERCYJACKSON-POSEIDONS_BLESSING.descript: The first {Times:diff()} time{Times:plural:|s} you consume [gold]Vigor[/gold] each turn, reapply the lost [gold]Vigor[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-POSEIDONS_BLESSING.title: Poseidon's Blessing
